release_notes:
- All /api/file-get APIs are now public and no longer require the authentication token in the query string.
- Improved message ID handling in WebUI responses.
- Thread-safe settings synchronization in WebUI.
- Refactored restart functions for safer process restarts.
- Hardened authentication: token only checked in Authorization header.
- MCP settings UI improved and always uses mcpServers (camelCase).
- Automatic migration for MCP servers and onboarding plugins.
- Fixed attachment handling and media parsing.
- Shared _safe_argv for agent and WebUI restarts.
upgrade_notes: No manual configuration changes required. Restart the WebUI and gateway after upgrading.
